basic_details.job_title: ESIC Bangalore Junior Residents Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC Bangalore) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 10 Junior Residents (Non-Teaching) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 26 May 2026 at the ESIC Bangalore office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation applicable as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.details: MBBS from a recognized university Should be registered with MCI/NMC Internship should be completed before the date of interview Those who have already done six months Junior Residency in any govt. Institutions need not apply again.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 1,22,859/- per month and statutory deductions as applicable.

selection_process: Document Verification Interview Screening Test (if turnout is more)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Bangalore Junior Residents?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Residents (Non-Teaching) posts at ESIC Bangalore is scheduled for 26th May 2026. Candidates should report between 09:30 AM and 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized university and should be registered with the Medical Council of India (MCI) or the National Medical Commission (NMC).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Resident (Non-Teaching) post is not exceeding 30 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,22,859/- per month, with statutory deductions as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Junior Resident (Non-Teaching) posts at ESIC Bangalore.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to bring all original certificates such as Matriculation Certificate (for proof of age), MBBS degree, Registration certificate with KMC/MCI, and two passport-size photographs along with one set of photocopies of all certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, Interview, and potentially a Screening Test if the turnout is high.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIC Bangalore office located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Bangalore office is located at ESIC PGIMSR & Model Hospital, Rajajinagar, Bangalore - 560010, Karnataka.
